agentPortfolioId.description: The unique identifier of the agent-portfolio.

agentPortfolioName.description: The display name of the agent-portfolio.

agentPortfolioGcid.description: The GCID associated with the agent-portfolio.

agentPortfolioVirtualBalance.description: The fixed virtual balance (in USD) that the agent-portfolio was funded with. The investmentAmountInUsd used to copy is proportional to this balance.

mirrorId.description: The Trading API mirror ID for this agent-portfolio's copy trade.

userTokens.description: The user tokens associated with this agent-portfolio.
